potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow the user to choose between full power and half power levels.
The system shall enable the user to set cooking time by entering a number.
The system shall stop immediately when the door is opened during the cooking process.
The system shall return to displaying the current time after stopping or cancelling and wait for the next use.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The microwave starts by showing the current time while it waits for the user.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall display the current time when it is waiting for user input.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the door is closed, the microwave becomes ready to start.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall become ready to start once the door is closed after setting the cooking time and power level.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow the user to choose between full power and half power levels.
hallucinations.reason: The original text does not specify that the user can switch between full and half power after selection, only at the initial choice.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall remain inactive if the door is open during operation.
hallucinations.reason: The original text states that the microwave cannot operate with the door open but does not explicitly state it remains inactive. It could be active and just unable to start cooking.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall stop immediately when the door is opened during the cooking process.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall remain inactive if the door is open during operation.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are essentially stating the same thing with slightly different wording.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow the user to choose between full power and half power levels.
ambiguities.reason: It is unclear if the user can switch between these settings after initial selection or only at the start.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall return to displaying the current time after stopping or cancelling and wait for the next use.
ambiguities.reason: It is not explicitly stated that the microwave will always display the time upon stopping or cancellation; it could show a different message depending on the implementation.
